import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, textwrap, math, itertools

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadiths = json.load(f)[:100]  # sample or entire? likely huge; let's get all length
len_quran = len(quran)
# Determine length for hadiths
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:

len_quran, len(hadiths)[:1] if isinstance(hadiths, list) else type(hadiths)

import json, re, unicodedata, math
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

# Load again quran
with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

def strip_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(c for c in unicodedata.normalize('NFD', s) if unicodedata.category(c) != 'Mn')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')  # tatweel
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # Unify alef forms
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    # Unify hamza on waw/ya
    s = s.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ء', 'ء')  # keep bare hamza
    # Unify ta marbuta to ha? maybe not; avoid altering semantics
    s = s.replace('ة', 'ه')
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # Remove punctuation and symbols
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # Remove Arabic punctuation marks
    s = re.sub(r'[،؛؟…”“«»]', ' ', s)
    # Collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

orig_full = "وَالَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ الْمُحْصَنَاتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةٍ شُهُودٍ فَاقِضْ لَهُنَّ نِصْفَ مَا زَعَمْنَ إِنْ أَرْبَعَةٌ فَمِنْ أَهْلِهِنَّ فَلْيُؤْتِهِنَّ نِصْفَ مَا تَمَل्लَكْنَ يَومَ عِرْضِهِنَّ وَيَحْلِفْنَ إِنْ أَرْبَعَةٌ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَأْتُوا بِأَرْبَعَةٍ فَآخَرُ أَنْ تُضَامَنَ نِسَاءٌ بِغَيْرِ ذَلِكَ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ عَدْلٍ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ أَخَوَةٌ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ رَحِمٍ وَلَيْسَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَكُونُوا عَلَى الْقَوْلِ أَكُلٌ عَلَى مِثْلِ مَا عَمِلَتْ بِهِ نِسَاءٌ مِنْ قَبْلُ عَلَى أَنْ تَصَدَقْنَ خَيْرًا بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ مَرْضِيَةً مِنْكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ عَدْلٍ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ أُخْتُكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ رَحِمٍ وَلَيْسَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَكُونُوا عَلَى الْقَوْلِ أَكُلٌ عَلَى مِثْلِ مَا عَمِلَتْ بِهِ نِسَاءٌ مِنْ قَبْلُ عَلَى أَنْ تَصَدَقْنَ خَيْرًا بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَلَيْسَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَخُضَنَ إِلى مَعْشَرٍ بَعْدَهُنَّ مِنْ بَعْدٍ وَلَيْسَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَرْجِعَ إِلَى عُقُولِ مُحْصِنَاتٍ بَعْدُ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ أُمّاً لَكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ عَدْلٍ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ أَخَوَةً لَكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ رَحِمٍ وَلَيْسَ لَكُمْ أَنْ تَكُونُوا عَلَى الْقَوْلِ أَكُلٌ عَلَى مِثْلِ مَا عَمِلَتْ بِهِ نِسَاءٌ مِنْ قَبْلُ عَلَى أَنْ تَصَدَقْنَ خَيْرًا بِالْمَعْرُوفِ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ بَيتُكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ عَدْلٍ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَحَدُهُنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَاجِكُمْ فَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُنَّ أَحَدٌ مِنْ دُونِكُمْ مِنْ عَدْلٍ وَلَوْ كَانَ أَح"
# Provided snippet maybe truncated; but we have orig full segment above.
norm_full = normalize_ar(orig_full)
norm_full[:200], len(norm_full)

# Build normalized ayah set
norm_ayahs = []
for i, rec in enumerate(quran):
    text = rec.get('ayah_text', '')
    norm = normalize_ar(text)
    norm_ayahs.append((i, norm, text, rec))

# search by containing phrase
phrase = normalize_ar("والذين يرمون المحصنات")
cands = [(i, n, t, r) for (i, n, t, r) in norm_ayahs if phrase in n]
len(cands), [c[2] for c in cands[:5]]

cand_text = cands[0][2]
cand_norm = cands[0][1]
# LCS function
def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming O(n*m) might be heavy; but strings length small
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

lcs_len = lcs_length(cand_norm, norm_full)
ratio = lcs_len / len(cand_norm) if cand_norm else 0
len_cand = len(cand_norm)
len_full = len(norm_full)
lcs_len, len_cand, len_full, ratio

from difflib import SequenceMatcher
seq_ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, cand_norm, norm_full).ratio()
cand_norm, seq_ratio

def greedy_subsequence_match_length(a, b):
    # returns number of characters matched by greedily scanning b to match a as subsequence
    i = 0
    positions = []
    for j, ch in enumerate(b):
        if i < len(a) and a[i] == ch:
            positions.append(j)
            i += 1
    return i, positions

greedy_len, pos = greedy_subsequence_match_length(cand_norm, norm_full)
len(cand_norm), greedy_len

def lcs_tokens(a_tokens, b_tokens):
    n, m = len(a_tokens), len(b_tokens)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a_tokens[i-1] == b_tokens[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

cand_tok = cand_tokens
full_tok = tokens(norm_full)
tlcs = lcs_tokens(cand_tok, full_tok)
tlcs, len(cand_tok), tlcs/len(cand_tok)
